ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Approved"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Delivered") ), OR( ISCHANGED(Total_Booking_Amount__c), ISCHANGED(Variant__c), ISCHANGED(Contact__c), ISCHANGED(Model__c), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Pending") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Approved or Delivered bookings cannot be modified. Raise a new booking if changes are needed.
